name: Locals Night
description: August launches with our third-ever Locals Night. Across both rooms, we’ve assembled a specially-curated run of b2bs and solo sets with some of the best artists in NY today. Holden Federico and Mos meet up for a special set. Both artists are adherents of timeless, evocative techno of the highest order. Federico’s releases on SK_eleven have been consistent standouts, and his recent “Origin” EP is a career high. Across its four tracks, he draws out stunning drama from carefully sculpted melodies and crisp, spacious sound design. Mos captures the best of gritty, austere techno. His sets build tension through careful restraint and fearless intuition. While Mos can bang it out as well as anyone, he can also tease out a climactic moment with patient, nervy confidence. Katie Rex and Concrete Husband team up to bring the frenzy. Both artists operate at the bleeding edge, starting with the energy at peak levels and taking it from there. Concrete Husband’s “Beg On Your Knees” is just one example of the producer’s mixture of merciless power and supple tenderness. Rex is a kindred spirit. The BOUND founder has made a career deploying slamming techno in service of unabashed, libidinous pleasure. Ne/Re/A returns to the room. One of the most consistent presences in the NY underground, Ne/ReA’s evolution into a world-class techno DJ has been thrilling to behold. The Merge resident is a galvanizing force and an inspiration to countless artists who follow in her wake. Manu Miran has become one of STUDIO’s definitive artists. Since moving to the city five years ago, Miran has established himself as one of the most dynamic talents in the NY underground. Embracing the rawest side of house music, Miran’s sets are explosive affairs, a perfect compliment to the late summer heat. Kim Anh and Justin Cudmore join forces for a down-and-dirty b2b. Anh’s immaculate sets are steeped in obscurity, filled with the greatest, most rugged gems you’ve never heard. Jacking house, deep italo, sensual boogie and more are lovingly woven together. Justin Cudmore embraces a similar ethos. The Bunker NY bad boy is rooted in classic Midwest house, but expands well beyond those boundaries. Analog Soul seals the deal. The duo is one of our era’s exemplary standard setting units. A true pillar of NY’s underground, their decades-long tenure in the city stands as an incontestable triumph for authentic, and yes soulful dance music. ■ No photos or videos ■ Ticket purchase does not guarantee entrance ■ No phone use on the dancefloor ■ The dance floor is for dancing, not conversation ■ No glowing/flashing clothes or items ■ Respect other people's space, no shuffling ■ Consent is mandatory ■ Zero tolerance for racism, homophobia, transphobia, sexism, ableism or any form of discrimination ■ Take care of each other, alert our staff if somebody isn't feeling well ■ Violating the house rules will result in removal PLEASE REVIEW HOUSE POLICIES AT LINK BELOW
secondary_categories: Holden Federico,Mos (NYC),Katie Rex,Concrete Husband,Ne/Re/A,Manu Miran,Kim Anh,Justin Cudmore,Analog Soul

name: The Bunker Nonstop: Rrose, Timnah, Carrier, Carlos Souffront, Patrick Russell, Scotia + more
description: The evening begins with Rrose, whose throbbing geothermal sound palette continues to set the bar for hypnotic techno. The UK’s Carrier takes control at peak hours, guiding us through trembling forest realms of dub and pulsating bass. And veteran selector Timnah arrives from Switzerland to lead us into the witching hours, traversing thick ambience that hangs in the air like mist above a steadily pulsing beat. NYC staple Sevyn Love greets the rising sun with a warm color palette and bouncing rhythmic euphoria, and Bunker regulars Lauren Flax and Scotia carry us into mid-day with their shared love of deep acid and electro grooves. Finally, two of Detroit and New York’s most celebrated crate-diggers Carlos Souffront and Patrick Russell unite for a master session b2b, maintaining a deep-groove equilibrium well into the afternoon. /// RSVP is $10 before 11pm and $15 before midnight. An RSVP is good for one person. If you're bringing friends, please have them RSVP here as well. We stop taking RSVPs at 6pm on the day of the party. In order to receive the RSVP discount, you must be at the ticket desk by the cutoff time and not just in line. It's wise to arrive early to make sure you're not standing in line when the time comes. An RSVP does not guarantee entry. Sometimes parties do sell out, so if you want to be sure you'll get in, it's best to grab a ticket in advance. /// Entry is at the discretion of our door staff. Online purchases are limited to four tickets maximum per person. If tickets are sold out here, we always hold a good amount at the door. We will do our best to admit those without tickets but entrance is not guaranteed. Nonstop tickets are divided by entry time. You must arrive during the hours listed on your ticket. For example, if you buy a "10PM–4AM" ticket, you must get here between 10pm and 4am. After you've arrived during your designated time window, you can stay as long as you'd like, so long as you abide by our safer space policy (more on that below). You're also welcome to come and go as you please. Re-entry is based on capacity and is not guaranteed. Nonstop attendees can attend Mister Sunday in the backyard starting at 3 pm without buying a separate ticket, and Nonstop re-entry is honored during Mister Sunday. Violence, non-consensual touching, racist, homophobic, transphobic, sexist, ageist or other discriminatory language, and leering are not allowed within our walls or in our back yard. If someone says or does something to make you feel uncomfortable while you’re here, let us know. /// Accessibility: The wheelchair entrance to our indoor space is in the driveway, which is the access point most commonly used to enter Nowadays. During parties the driveway gate is locked, so please ask staff at the street entrance for assistance with entry. All of our bathrooms are gender-neutral. There is one accessible stall indoors. Just ask any Nowadays staff member for the key, and they can show you the way. During parties, seating is available both on and off the dance floor. While we don’t have a dedicated quiet space indoors during parties, the booths next to coat check are a little quieter, and the deck and back yard a little quieter than that. Most nighttime parties include the use of strobe lights and water based haze.

name: POSER
description: Come early, stay late, and don’t be a POSER: nightlife has no room for the girls who fake it! Leave it all on the dance floor and abide by the rules of the rave… no drama, no photos, and no cutting lines until you’re inside… no throwing shade or leaving your friends for trade. Looks encouraged, dancing required — and remember, It’s a marathon, not a sprint… a real party girl knows how to pace herself. Two dance floors: Green Room (Indoors) & The Alley (Open Air); 10 hours of music; tickets at the door as capacity allows.

name: PACIFIC MODE Day to Night: adobeprincess / Edward / Loidis / XDB / Galcher Lustwerk + more
description: *Limited amount of ticket is available at door NYC <> Tokyo — PACIFIC MODE is holding down with day time open-air to warehouse style into sunrise. Kicks off open-air from 4pm with Kat Offline. Her playful rhythmic sets a party perfect tone. And ace of Japan, Samo from Fullhouse crew makes a NYC/US debut. She has played Rainbow Disco Club, rural festival, all over Japan/Asia. She will show her fullest house style. Following Galcher Lustwerk bringing sexy boogie to the peak of open-air. From 10pm, the front room features an all-night session with Alien D & Millia. Dubbed out free style B2B leads us promised magical moment. The warehouse starts with adobeprincess who is recently expanding the scope of musical journey more and more, blends dubby minimal techno, chugging psychedelic grooves. XBD of Metrolux record, delivering deep-cuts of house and techno with superb skills and let the music speak itself. Making PM debut as well as following DJ Edward. Excellent producer of the iconic shadowy texture with surrealistic edge. His Waking Life and Fusion Festival sets are just hats off. Closing the party is PM’s fav DJ/Producer Loidis. Fresh back from EU tour, his depth of sonic drifting sound welcomes the end of 14 hours party. Please respect fellow dancers, staffs, space, and neighborhood. There is a zero-tolerance policy for harassment of any kind. Please make sure to party safe, hydrate & sweat—hope to see you there! Lighting: mRYZ Sound: subBASS SOUND SYSTEM Design: mamastudio Music in Video: Edward - La Grotta

name: Oscar G Rooftop Party
description: Oscar G’s Beats are an essential part of NYC’s Summer Event Experience. Saturday Aug 1st he makes his debut at Superior Ingredients Roof for a day party that will set a new bar for getting down to House Music on a New York rooftop! A lifelong resident of Miami and a cornerstone of the global underground, Oscar G is an award-winning DJ, producer, and songwriter with a career spanning over three decades. A founding member of seminal collectives like Murk, Liberty City, and Funky Green Dogs, he has consistently topped Billboard charts while maintaining deep underground credibility. Oscar remains a purist at heart, viewing DJing as the ultimate art form and continuing to shape the pulse of his hometown’s world-renowned club scene. This event is Rain Or Shine. The venue is a climate controlled enclosed glass rooftop with a retractable roof.

name: The Disco Express: Blvck Truffle, Bea Trinidad, Bustin' Loose, Roland & Brother Rich
description: The Disco Express returns to New York for a night dedicated to the records that have shaped dance floors for decades. Built on deep crates, impeccable selections, and an unwavering love for disco, house, funk, and soul, the London-born label and party has spent the last nine years connecting dancers across the globe. What began as an intimate loft party in East London has grown into one of the world's most respected disco collectives, evolving into a record label, international party series. From London to Berlin, Paris, Milan, Amsterdam, New York, and beyond, The Disco Express has cultivated a devoted following by celebrating dance music's rich history while championing the artists carrying it forward. Leading the night in CARGO is Bustin' Loose, founder of The Disco Express and a DJ whose uplifting blend of disco, soulful house, vintage funk, and rare grooves has taken him to clubs and festivals across Europe, North America, and beyond. Joining him are Brooklyn's Roland & Brother Rich, longtime staples of New York's underground whose sets effortlessly weave together classic house, disco, funk, soul, and the unmistakable energy of the city's dance floor culture. Holding down the Foyer are Blvck Truffle and Bea Trinidad. Truffle draws deeply from the underground traditions of New York and New Jersey house music, while Bea Trinidad brings a globally informed perspective rooted in vinyl, soulful house, disco, jazz, and R&B. Together, they set the tone with selections that are thoughtful, timeless, and built for movement. Venue opens at 5PM | Happy Hour 5PM-7PM | Music at 9PM Kitchen open late | 21+
secondary_categories: Bustin' Loose,Roland & Brother Rich,Bea Trinidad,Blvck Truffle

name: The Ornate Project: Infected Mushroom (live band) + Blastoyz
description: Presented by The Ornate Project Saturday, August 1st, 2026 Doors: 10:00 PM | 4:00 AM VENUE: - Park Slope Warehouse | 153 26th Street, Brooklyn, NY DJ: - INFECTED MUSHROOM [LIVE BAND] -BLASTOYZ Support acts: - Bruce Wayne - 8 bit aura Info: - 21+ proper I.D. required - Presented by The Ornate Project After twenty-five years making waves in the scene, Infected Mushroom has earned their reputation as a groundbreaking legend in electronic music. Twice ranked amongst the world’s ten best DJs by DJ Magazine, with streaming numbers in the tens of millions and a cult following of die-hard fans, the Israel-bred, LA-based duo has created one of the most powerful kingdoms in the world of electronic music. The combined force of Israeli producers Amit “Duvdev” Duvdevani and Erez Eisen, Infected is world-renowned for their sonic innovations, genre-defying sound, and unrivaled production quality. This trademark sound is cultivated through hypnotic arrangements, layered melodies, and a willingness to blur the lines of genre. While widely recognized as pioneers of psytrance music, over the years Infected has demonstrated an ability to not only break the rules, but create their own rulebook entirely, and inspire other artists to do the same. Since 1999, they have been on a non-stop worldwide tour, selling out shows and headlining festivals around the globe.

name: Enzo is Burning with slugg *Open Air*
description: London’s Enzo is Burning heads to H0l0 Yard for a late-night session, joined by Miami’s Slugg and local support from Katita. Enzo first gained attention through widely circulated edits of Aaliyah’s “Give It Up” and Alan Fitzpatrick’s “On My Mind,” before shifting focus to original productions now played in key venues including fabric (London), Amnesia (Ibiza), and Space Miami. Over the past year, he has appeared with Defected, elrow, Kaluki, and ABODE, alongside a sold-out headline show at Night Tales London. His work has received support from Marco Carola, Peggy Gou, Joseph Capriati, and FISHER, as his touring schedule expands across Europe, the U.S., and Australia. Joining him is Slugg, a Miami-based DJ and producer and the founder of Get Busy. Known for drawing from both house and 90s hip-hop influences, Slugg has performed at Floyd, ARC Music Festival, BPM Festival, III Points, Serum Chicago, and EDC Orlando, as well as events such as Paradise and Okeechobee. His sets have earned backing from Jamie Jones, Loco Dice, FISHER, Joseph Capriati, Mason Collective, and Classmatic. With a background in music theory and experience across multiple genres, Enzo’s sets are built for extended time on the dancefloor, balancing control and spontaneity. Set within H0l0 Yard, the night centers on a stripped-back club environment where the focus remains on sound and connection.

Commanding the mothership is **Atish**, your interstellar guide through deep, hypnotic soundscapes and celestial grooves. With a signature style that’s equal parts dreamy, driving, and emotionally charged, Atish will beam you up, spin you out, and land you somewhere between ecstasy and orbit. name: Liminal Collective: Groove Therapy with Dr. Strangefunk, Chillosophy and baby-g
description: Antsy? Dance-deprived? Holding onto that last crumb of serotonin? We have a party for that. Liminal Collective presents: Groove Therapy, an immersive night of dark, groovy, and psychedelic dance music, clinically formulated to restore the heart, body + mind. Leading the session is the renowned Dr. Strangefunk, hailing from Montreal, whose infectious blend of driving grooves, hypnotic textures, and playful psychedelic energy has been healing dancefloors across the globe. Assisting in your treatment are Liminal Collective co-founders Chillosophy and baby-g, who will guide you through every stage of the evening, from opening dose to final release. Patients can expect a carefully administered progression through deep, hypnotic, and peak-time sounds spanning cutting-edge "research techno" and psy-tech. Side effects may include: prolonged dancing, elevated mood, temporary loss of concept of time, and a persistent desire for "one more track." In some cases, patients have reported full-body euphoria and an inability to leave the dancefloor. Treatment takes place in a warehouse loft nestled in the heart of Bushwick's industrial zone — outfitted with comfy seating, an adjoining rooftop, and refreshment lounges for between-session recovery. No appointment necessary. Walk-ins welcome. Relief is one bassline away.

name: BARANGAY: Jay Dalawa, Alcantara, LANSUH, JAV/ , Gabriel Etrata
description: BARANGAY & Friends presents JAV/ — a longtime force in Manila’s underground since 2013, whose sound and presence have become synonymous with some of the city’s most respected spaces, including Nokal, Apotheka, Black Market, and TIME. Join us for a night of connections, community, and electronic music that continue to shape Manila’s dance culture. __________ Jupiter Disco is a safe space for all. Our most important goal is to ensure everyone who steps into our space feels welcome and safe. In order to achieve this goal, it's mission critical that everyone approaches each other with respect. That means everyone. We are passionate about bringing people together and building connections between participants in and adjacent to our community. Go ahead and say hi to someone new while you're here with us! If you see or experience anything that makes you feel uncomfortable, please alert one of our team members and we will coordinate a resolution immediately. We encourage everyone to be present and interface with the physical elements around you while you're with us, so we ask that you please limit your phone use throughout the space. Phone screen and camera lights can also be distracting, so please be mindful of the brightness and the length of time you use those lights, if at all. If you intend to smoke (anything), please take a break outside and take a few steps down the block. Don't worry, we always have re-entry.

name: Refuge Saturday Daytime with Oliver Koletzki, Lauren Ritter
description: Saturdays @ Refuge ~Before. During. Afters~ Refuge Hi-Def Dance Club is a 500-cap underground nightclub in East Williamsburg built around sound, energy, and atmosphere. At its core is REX, a custom 4-point system designed by co-founder Craig “Shorty” Bernabeu, with four 10-foot stacks surrounding the dance floor for a powerful, immersive experience. Each night is curated to push that system to its full potential — a true Musical Arts Performance in every sense. 21+ only. All sales are final.

name: EDMBoat.com - #1 EDM HOUSE SUNSET BOAT 2026
description: Get ready to vibe on the water with nonstop EDM and house beats To keep the party flowing | NYC SUNSET EDITION!!! EDM HOUSE MUSIC SUNSET BOAT PARTY 2026 (BLUE GLOVE HOSPITALITY BRINGS YOU ALL VERIFIED EVENTS. PLEASE MAKE SURE TO GET YOUR TICKETS FROM HERE, IT IS THE ONLY VERIFIED PAGE! ) Elevate your night with euphoric drops, hypnotic rhythms, and nonstop house music. As the skyline lights pulse in the distance, dance to a curated blend of deep house, tech house, and progressive anthems. This is where NYC meets Ibiza… on water. **24-HOUR BLUE GLOVE CUSTOMER SERVICE, TEXT US AT 917-716-6481** What Does Your Ticket to the HipHop vs. Reggaeton Boat Party Include? Iconic NYC Views – Cruise past the city’s most famous sights like the Statue of Liberty, Freedom Tower, Ellis Island, and Brooklyn Bridge with front-row views. Table Service & VIP Bottle Options – Enjoy drinks brought straight to you or level up your night with a VIP bottle service experience. For info, contact Sammy at (917)-716-6481 or email sammy@blueglovehospitality.com Live DJs Across Two Levels – Move to the rhythm of Reggaeton, Hip-Hop, R&B, Afrobeats, Latin, House and more, spun by top DJs across two lively floors. Indoor & Outdoor Vibes – Choose between open-air decks for fresh breezes or a climate-controlled cabin with panoramic harbor views. Celebrate Life’s Big Moments – Ideal for birthdays, bachelorettes, anniversaries, or graduations. Feel free to bring balloons and cakes (note: outside food is not permitted). Check the ticket section for personalized event flyers. Onboard Food & Drinks for Purchase – Treat yourself to expertly crafted cocktails and delicious bites from our menu. We have a different menu each week ranging from amazing hearty meat options to vegetarian friendly eats. Professional Party Photos – Keep the memories alive with an event photographer capturing your best moments (details available in ticket add-ons). Convenient Access & Parking Options – Free street parking near the dock or nearby garage options (around $40). We recommend using Uber or Lyft for ease. Dress Code: We embrace individual style while keeping a chic vibe. Please follow the guidelines below to ensure smooth entry: DON’T: wear anything with offensive text, athletic shorts, swim trunks, slides, sweatpants, Timberlands, sandals, or flip flops. DO: opt for trendy and put-together looks. Jeans (with minimal rips), smart casual outfits for men (think collared shirts, stylish tees, and jeans), clean sneakers or dress shoes, and forward-facing hats that complement your outfit are welcome. How long will the party last? The event lasts approximately 3 hours as we sail through New York City's iconic harbor. Will I Get a Good View of the Statue of Liberty? Yes! You’ll have a perfect photo opportunity with sweeping, 360-degree views of Lady Liberty and the NYC skyline right from the boat—so bring your camera and get ready to snap some unforgettable shots! What is the location of the boat and when do we need to arrive by? We have multiple boats going out all weekend with different themes. The location is Skyport Marina and all other information will be emailed to you. Any questions at all, text 917-716-6481 REFUND POLICY - No Refunds, All Sales Final: Unforeseen circumstances beyond our control will not be grounds for a refund, including but not limited to the following: local or national weather conditions, natural disasters, waiting in lines, extended waits in lines, family emergencies, medical emergencies including COVID-19 results, employment issues including layoffs, traffic, parking, public or private transportation issues, etc. If you purchased for the incorrect date, location, event, etc, we are not obligated to provide a refund, credit, exchange or transfer. We reserve the right to refuse entry to any ticket-holder, without a refund, for any reason, including but not limited to: disorderly behavior, failing to comply with the rules of the venue, incorrect attire, intoxication, venue capacity, breach of security, and other restrictions. You are aware that Talent is subject to change without notice, which is not grounds for a refund. You are aware that amenities promised are not guaranteed and are not grounds for a refund. Dissatisfaction with any aspect of the event is not grounds for a refund, including but not limited to: music, DJ(s), decorations or lack thereof, party favors or lack thereof, beverages or lack thereof, alcohol selection, bar staff, food availability and selection, fellow patrons/attendees, venue staff, event staff, security, performances, ambiance, amenities, venue, check-in process, seating or lack of seating, wait in lines, emergency closures of event, delayed commencing of events, early ending of events, etc.

name: Kabinett // ALL NIGHT LONG
description: Bogota bad boy Kabinett returns for his first all nighter and we're so excited for him to nearly set our club on fire that we took out extra insurance. Not really but that's what you have to look forward to... No presale tickets Doors at 9pm DJs 10pm - Late Free before 10pm $20 after CASH ONLY ATM onsite 90 Wythe Ave Brooklyn, NY Flyer by @justaddwateradri Gabriela is a dream we had when we needed music the most. A blissful escape that brings us together. ~ Our mission is to create an energetic and engaged dance floor, where people of all backgrounds have a safe place to express themselves. Have as much fun as possible, but never at anyone else’s expense. Admittance to our venue is determined at the door in an effort to create what we dreamt up. We have a very intimate space and we hope you appreciate and respect the door staff. Consent is mandatory! It is sexy! Be mindful of the people sharing space with you. We have a ZERO tolerance policy for discrimination, harassment or violence of any kind. Alert staff if you need help. In order to allow people to immerse themselves in our dance floor, please keep phone use, chatting and flash photography to a minimum. There are plenty of other spaces to lounge in the rest of the club if you’re feeling called to doing any of these things. Take care of yourself and each other. xo

name: Garden Party presents: Camp Garden
description: Attention campers! This is not a drill. On Saturday, August 1, Camp Garden officially opens its gates for the first Garden Party of the summer season (it was too hot for us in June and July). Inspired by the annual migration of the gay populace to summer campgrounds around the world, we're hosting our own gathering of the minds and survival skills. Whether you're swimming in Whole Festival's radioactive hot dog water this year, surviving on protein bars and granola at Honcho, or skipping both because you can't bear to skip a day of skincare + hot showers, Camp Garden is your last chance for a summertime escape. All the community, chaos, and spirit at a FRACTION of the cost! Come kick off the August month with an evening at Libera in the Ace Hotel New York, featuring sounds from your resident camp counselors: heauxtep (@fakeheauxs), @ron.ld, @wgrden, ALI IRL (@ali__irl), + more TBA along with some very special surprises, limited edition merch drops, & more! No bad attitudes, no racism, no transphobia, no xenophobia. Yes kindness, yes PLUR. Homophobia (gay guy-specific) TBD. Door policy for prospective campers: bring a bear, be a bear.

name: NYC Sunset Boat Party
description: This summer, step aboard one of NYC’s hottest nightlife experiences for one unforgettable night on the water. Join NYPartyCruise.com on Saturday, August 1st, 2026 for the ultimate sunset-to-nightlife experience: NYC Sunset Party Cruise An exclusive 4-hour summer yacht party aboard the stunning Harbor Lights Yacht, where you’ll experience the magic of NYC from daylight to moonlight. Board while the sun is shining, sip cocktails as the sky transforms into a breathtaking sunset, dance under the glowing city skyline, and cruise into the night beneath the moonlight. This is your chance to enjoy the perfect blend of a summer sunset cruise and NYC nightlife party—all in one incredible experience. _____________________________________________ Event Details NYC Sunset Party Cruise Saturday, August 1st, 2026 Boarding: 7:00 PM | Returning: 11:00 PM Aboard the Multi-Level Harbor Lights Yacht SkyPort Marina – 2430 FDR Drive (23rd St & FDR Drive), New York, NY 10010 _____________________________________________ Your Experience Includes • Spectacular sunset views over the NYC skyline • Panoramic Views of NYC Skyline, Statue of Liberty & Brooklyn Bridge • 3 Levels of Music Across the Yacht • Spacious open-air rooftop deck • 2 climate-controlled indoor floors • English Music: Top 40, Hip-Hop, Dance & House • Latin Vibes: Reggaeton, Salsa, Bachata, Merengue, Latin House • Drinks & Bottle Service Available for Purchase • Buffet Food Available for Purchase _____________________________________________ Food, Drinks & Bottle Service Full-service bars available onboard Premium drinks and bottle service available for purchase Buffet-style food available for purchase, typically featuring selections such as: chicken, rice, pasta, vegetables, salad, empanadas, & more _____________________________________________ Age & Dress Code 21+ Event Valid government-issued ID required Dress Code: Summer Chic • Stylish Casual _____________________________________________ Celebrate Your Birthday Onboard Make your special night unforgettable with exclusive birthday packages. For birthday reservations or more information: events@nypartycruise.com NYPartyCruise.com _____________________________________________ Why This Cruise Sells Out From golden hour on the water to moonlit dancing under the NYC skyline, NYPartyCruise delivers the ultimate summer yacht party experience.
